channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Hyperliquid is emerging as a challenger to traditional exchanges and prediction markets, says FalconX
item.description: A new report shows Hyperliquid is rapidly expanding beyond crypto into pre-IPO markets, prediction contracts, and 24/7 asset trading, putting Wall Street giants on high alert.

item.title: Crypto entrepreneur Chun Wang joins SpaceX mission to Mars
item.description: Chun Wang, who bankrolled and led a SpaceX flight over Earth’s poles, says he will head to Mars on SpaceX’s first manned mission to the red planet.

item.title: Bitcoin trades above $77,000 as oil's 5% slide pushes Asian equities higher
item.description: Oil’s 5% drop on potential Strait of Hormuz reopening boosted Asian equities and supported crypto sentiment.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs' 6 day loss streak pushes market closer to net outflows for 2026
item.description: Dek: US Bitcoin ETF net inflows have shrunk to $536 million so far in 2026, after recording a six-day run of net outflows totalling $1.55 billion.

item.title: BLACKROCK JUST SOLD $1 BILLION OF BTC BlackRock sold Bitcoin every single day last week. They sold a total of $1.01 BILLION of BTC. If BlackRock is selling… who’s buying? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9waHhVeDRmVzVEbFZQMG5FcUJLNXUxaGVWaFRvYjRhTUpWUTJLZS1qTTFMR1E3UFk5bGlZUmljVXNwaTFLZDFGMnM3VnFPYU1BTWVIeWFoWFVTWlk?oc=5" target="_blank">BLACKROCK JUST SOLD $1 BILLION OF BTC Black…

item.title: ‘TrapDoor’ malware targets crypto dev tools in supply chain attack
item.description: Socket says a campaign of malicious packages is aiming to steal crypto and is injecting hidden instructions that hijack popular AI coding assistants.

item.title: Bitcoin options are coming to Nasdaq. Here's what it means for you.
item.description: The new offering, pending CFTC approval, aims to democratize seamless crypto risk management

item.title: ‘Developed ecosystem’ based on crypto has sprung up for AI agents: Report
item.description: Stablecoins became the default settlement layer for AI agents as crypto payment rails can handle sub-dollar transactions more efficiently, says a report from Keyrock.

item.title: Kalshi backs prediction markets lobby group with former Trump official
item.description: "We’re not going to be outspent or out-organized by entrenched interests protecting their monopolies," said John Bivona, head of government relations at Kalshi.

item.title: SEC postpones plan allowing 'innovation exemption' for tokenized stocks: Report
item.description: The SEC has reportedly delayed releasing a proposal permitting tokenized stock trading after receiving industry concerns.

item.title: Vitalik: Ethereum Foundation to Sell Less ETH Going Forward Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin said in a post on X that the Ethereum Foundation has decided to use its remaining resources to prioritize long-term sustainability rather than expanding the brea - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9XLXRZR2xMRjVob0w4YTJVSERnc0dza05VQXgyZFdDVHlUMGVlaGc0SHpHMm9RQjBpWG5oaVZVQTBqWjQxVU0xY2FPYVVtdHBLSTA3ZnJmM3FncGRHQi1MbzdHNA?oc=5" target="_blank">Vitalik: Ethereum Foundation to …

item.title: Strategy Buys Bonds, Not Bitcoin This Week; Holdings at 843,738 BTC Strategy Executive Chairman Michael Saylor said in a post on X that the company bought bonds, not Bitcoin, this week. The accompanying chart shows that as of May 24, 2026, Strategy’s - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFB3MjNkZXNwR0RtZGxEaHllZkVFbTkyaExrQzd3TzFHdl9wallKTGh5a1hvSTZpQjRtaGpheHZXdFlRelZDTDlHd3lsYmlJWUFid3ZkWm9FWG5HUFh3Q2NqOGJZUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy Buys Bonds, Not Bitcoin…

item.title: Soaring bond prices signal 'structural' shift and Bitcoin 'supercycle': Analyst
item.description: Fixed-income investors are in a "panic" as government securities, once seen as low-risk, begin to crack, according to BitMEX researcher Shang Wu.

item.title: Now You Can Buy Bitcoin, XRP and More in ChatGPT via MoonPay
item.description: MoonPay's new app lets users buy cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and Solana, through ChatGPT just by speaking with the chatbot.

item.title: Buterin fires back at Ethereum Foundation critics, recommits to neutrality
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation holds less than 1% of all ETH in circulation while other protocol foundations typically hold 10-50% of their native token's supply, the founder said.

item.title: Coinbase does not fear competition from Wall Street, says exchange executive
item.description: A Coinbase executive called on regulators to implement sensible crypto regulation, while announcing the Stand With Crypto event taking place in over 500 locations worldwide.

item.title: Strategy Now Holds $65 Billion in Bitcoin—These Are Its Biggest BTC Buys
item.description: How did Michael Saylor's firm amass a record stash of Bitcoin? Here's a look back at how Strategy made such massive gains.

item.title: Crypto and the Fed: State of Crypto
item.description: This past week saw incremental, but potentially important steps.

item.title: FTX law firm Fenwick & West to pay $54M to victims in settlement
item.description: The law firm agreed to a settlement in February 2026 and is facing a separate $525 million lawsuit over its role in the collapse of the FTX crypto exchange.

item.title: ⚡️ JUST IN: Vitalik Buterin says the Ethereum Foundation is moving toward a leaner role, with less emphasis on expansion and broader ecosystem control. Buterin adds the EF plans to sell less ETH and currently holds around 0.16% of total ETH supply. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE95UzhINUdoYmV6RThXQlBqQVVxTWZpY2VWQjhFakt0WUl1dHREa2VPRFg1S3dPLUNVR0dqZldxc3ZQNU9FM1ZjaVlqc3VPOWQwc1FZanJjWC1Fd0REeGNBb043MTI?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ JUST IN: Vitalik Buterin say…

item.title: Vitalik：EF Is Not Ethereum’s Center, but a Smaller Node With a Clear Mission Vitalik Buterin said the Ethereum Foundation is not the “center” of Ethereum, but one node with a clearly defined purpose. He said the EF will become smaller, more long-term-orient - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5VZVdLSlR4ZDJiOGQwLVloSDdNcElIQmFWSTZSaElxeXNTOWxtT3RlZkNyeHVuUkNMOHFMV0VtOEtlYUxhbFFSQ3NYaG1ybkZhQVI3OFRMN2lZLW5PbENDSFhQSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Vitalik：EF Is Not Ethereum’s Cen…

item.title: AI Startup Says It Will Pay People $2,000 a Month to Masturbate—Yes, Really
item.description: Joi AI is hiring 10 “masturbation consultants” to test its AI-guided masturbation feature and report how it affects stress, sleep, mood, and confidence.

item.title: Some of my perspective on where the @ethereumfndn is going. First of all, this is only my own view. The board is not just me, and I have no extra special powers on the board that the other board members do not. @aerugoettinea is the one executing much of t - x.com

item.title: Tom Lee’s Ethereum portfolio down $7.35B as ETH price outlook worsens
item.description: ETH’s bearish chart setup points to a 25% drop toward $1,600, risking over $10 billion in paper losses for BitMine in the coming weeks.

item.title: A massive $1 trillion hidden market is waiting to be unlocked in bitcoin, says new report
item.description: Ledn forecasts the bitcoin-backed lending market could grow to $1 trillion within a decade as new research highlights strong borrower demand.

item.title: This week we bought bonds, not bitcoin. The ₿itVac is charging. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1LMDlvdnFGMW9WWlBnTC1Xc1pIZjR4RkNCWnZrSkp6UUhhcEF3WTY5am5rQ3Y4aHdvS1FxRk15TDlGbUxXdWpaZldhR2IzcVBxZE5WMGJ0UWppZE0?oc=5" target="_blank">This week we bought bonds, not bitcoin. The…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: AI is speeding up the quantum threat to crypto, security experts warn
item.description: Researchers and builders believe that artificial intelligence may be accelerating the quantum timeline and forcing a broader rethink of how digital security works.

item.title: Crypto rails are becoming the default payment layer for AI agents, report says
item.description: A new report from Keyrock says stablecoins on blockchain rails are becoming the go-to payment layer for AI agents as traditional card rails struggle to handle micropayments.

item.title: CFTC officials who questioned prediction markets were suspended: NYT
item.description: A New York Times investigation found that senior CFTC officials who raised concerns about Polymarket, Crypto.com and Gemini were suspended and pushed out.

item.title: Blockchain researcher defends Ethereum Foundation, says it’s doing ‘exactly’ its job
item.description: William Mougayar says critics are measuring the Ethereum Foundation by the wrong standard, claiming it was never meant to pump ETH or court institutions.

item.title: Why is Bitcoin falling despite pro-crypto Kevin Warsh becoming Fed chair?
item.description: Rising short-term bond yields and Warsh's hawkish comments in the past are reviving fears of a December rate hike, which could slam the brakes on Bitcoin's recovery.

item.title: StablR Euro and US dollar stablecoins depeg after $2.8M exploit
item.description: Stablecoin issuer StablR says it has been compromised, with Blockaid suspecting the cause is a private key compromise of an owner of a multisig wallet used for minting tokens.

item.title: Bitcoin bounces as Trump prepares to announce ‘negotiated’ Iran deal
item.description: US President Donald Trump posted on Truth Social that final details of a deal with Iran are currently being discussed, giving crypto markets a lift.

item.title: 70% of all crypto wrench attacks happen in France: Report
item.description: Centralized data collection is a honeypot for hackers and organized criminals looking to target crypto holders and their families, according to Bitcoiners.

item.title: Bitcoin heads higher as President Trump announces Iran peace agreement
item.description: "An Agreement has been largely negotiated, subject to finalization between the United States of America, the Islamic Republic of Iran, and the various other Countries," wrote President Trump late Saturday afternoon.

item.title: Analysts forecast a Bitcoin crash to the $60K level, revisiting 2026 low
item.description: The price of Bitcoin is about $75,800 at the time of publication, a nearly 40% decrease from the all-time high of about $126,000 reached in October 2025.

item.title: buy bitcoin, hodl, repeat. i was expecting efficient market hypothesis to kick in with alts and price them at $0. but i was making that call a decade ago, so I am quite surprised it took this long for the efficient market to catch-up with air tokens, altcoins, memecoins - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9pZVZ0WVFXNU95dUl5UnI4dExDVnRtUXp2NWRlNWZ5N2M4UGpydzZWMTl2dlZaM2VaTHdWVlU0WnRVM2gtdGFnY1JyVVpmSzcwWnE3REFjd3FnV1M2?oc=5" target="_blank">buy bitcoin, hodl, repeat. i was expecting…

item.title: Bitcoin is ready to beat stocks and bonds again after underperformance against Wall Street
item.description: Former Credit Suisse global head of portfolio and Risk Dimensions CIO Mark Connors says bitcoin has broken out of its longest stretch of underperformance in history and is ready to beat stocks, bonds, and gold as inflation stubbornly stick…

item.title: Warsh will cut rates, despite consensus view of rate hikes: Analyst
item.description: The current Federal Funds target rate is between 350 and 375 basis points, which traders project to rise by at least 25 basis points in December 2026.

item.title: Firefox's Big Redesign Gives You a Button to Kill All the AI
item.description: Project Nova is coming later this year with a cleaner look, compact mode, and a toggle to make AI features disappear entirely.

item.title: Bitcoin Dives Below $75K for First Time in a Month as Crypto Liquidations Near $1 Billion
item.description: Bitcoin touched its lowest price in a month overnight following an awful week for ETFs, which shed over $1.25 billion this week.

item.title: JUST IN: There's now a 75% Bitcoin will drop to $70,000 before going up to $90,000, according to Polymarket 👀 HODL! ✊ - x.com

item.title: Argentina Launched an AI to Predict the Future. It Couldn't Predict a Typo
item.description: Milei's government unveiled a social digital twin to overhaul public policy—announced via a video full of AI slop, grammatical errors, and a deepfake of a minister.

item.title: MASSIVE 🚨 Meta has officially overtaken Bitcoin to become the 12th largest asset in the world. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9DaF9PT2JHbGdVWjhNaXhWYU81TWJVYVBnU1c2SnVQVHZaUTQ3dEZPWVZiekE1OE05RGZnTk9WUFJxQlI2UGgxVGZ2Yk53akRzdzJVWVRsOU1WMG1JMUY5UTBn?oc=5" target="_blank">MASSIVE 🚨 Meta has officially ove…

item.title: Crypto trader sees Hyperliquid, AI tokens leading next altcoin rally
item.description: Hyperliquid’s surge and renewed interest in AI-focused crypto projects are signaling a broader return of risk appetite in altcoins, says Michael van de Poppe.

item.title: Binance denies new WSJ report alleging $850M in Iran-linked transactions
item.description: Binance CEO Richard Teng denied a new WSJ report alleging $850 million in Iran-linked transactions flowed through the exchange to the IRGC.

item.title: A wide-ranging conversation on Bitcoin, Strategy, volatility, conviction, and why there is no second best. $BTC $MSTR $STRC - x.com

item.title: 3 Wacky Hermes Skills You Should Try
item.description: A real astrology engine disguised as a fortune teller. A scammer-punishment machine loaded with the Shrek screenplay. A tool that reads any book and maps every idea to your actual life. These are not normal skills.

item.title: Clarity Act could spark a boom in crypto ‘yield-as-a-service’
item.description: The bill’s restrictions on yield-bearing crypto products may push the industry away from passive "hold-to-earn" models and toward AI-driven, compliant yield infrastructure, according to STBL Chief Commercial Officer Joe Vollono.

item.title: I've been an Ethereum supporter since the early days and I still believe it's one of the most important pieces of infrastructure in crypto. The tech is great, my conviction hasn't changed in that respect. But watching 9 senior researchers and key operators leave the - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin tanks to $74,300 as spot ETFs bleed $2.26 billion in two weeks
item.description: U.S.-listed spot bitcoin exchange-traded funds have seen more than $2.26 billion in outflows over the past two weeks.

item.title: BLOCKCHAIN EXPANSION UPDATE Chainlink services expanded across the following blockchains: CCIP • Creditcoin • Neo X • Tempo CRE • Ink Data Streams • Robinhood Chain (testnet) Data Feeds • Ink - x.com

item.title: Kash Patel-Linked Apparel Store Goes Dark After Pushing Crypto-Stealing Malware
item.description: User losses weren’t immediately clear.

item.title: SEC Delays Tokenized Stocks Innovation Exemption Amid Concerns: Bloomberg
item.description: The SEC’s expected regulatory framework would have provided clarity for companies looking to tokenize traditional assets like stocks.

item.title: Microsoft's Free AI Just Beat OpenAI and Google at Browsing the Web
item.description: Fara1.5 is a family of open-weight browser agents from Microsoft Research that outperforms OpenAI's Operator and Google's Gemini 2.5 Computer Use on the industry's toughest live-web benchmark.

item.title: The tokenized commodity market is almost entirely gold. Gold is an obvious fit for tokenization: It’s global, standard, and already tracked through paper claims Plus, crypto investors already get it. Bitcoin was called “digital gold” long before tokenized gold took o - x.com

item.title: Kalshi Debuts 'Fair Markets' Lobby Group as Congress Opens Insider Trading Probe
item.description: Kalshi unveiled Americans for Fair Markets, an advocacy group to help shape policymakers’ perception of prediction markets.

item.title: Two Men Federally Charged Over AI Deepfake Porn Under the Take It Down Act
item.description: Federal prosecutors charged two men under the 2025 law that criminalizes non-consensual AI-generated intimate imagery.

item.title: F2Pool founder who controls 11% of bitcoin's hashrate to lead first SpaceX mission to Mars
item.description: Chun Wang, the first Mission Commander for SpaceX’s first commercial spaceflight to Mars, is crucial for the future transport of millions of tons of cargo and a million citizens to the Red Planet.
